basicMemory.placementConventions: Notes for the claude-hashline repo live under claude-hashline/ in the shared `main` project (MCP server is globally pinned to main). Folders: claude-hashline/sessions (resume checkpoints), claude-hashline/decisions (patch-grammar / hashing / edit-semantics choices), claude-hashline/tasks (in-flight work), claude-hashline/notes (design rationale, concepts, investigations). Schemas (Session/Decision/Task) are shared at schemas/ in main. Light structure — folders appear as notes land.
